subject: fix(pwa): catch unhandled rejections from registration.update()
body:
Visibility handler and hourly interval call _registration.update()
fire-and-forget. If the registration becomes invalid (SW unregistered
externally, network error), the returned Promise rejects without a
handler — generating console errors and triggering debug console
interception, potentially spamming the log buffer.

checkForUpdate() already wraps this in try/catch. Added .catch(() => {})
to the two fire-and-forget callers for parity.

Tags: pwa, hooks, error-handling
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: patch
